holdings.infoBox: UTES is an equity ETF with a total of 19 individual holdings. The top holdings are Talen Energy stock at 12.30%, Constellation Energy at 10.71%, Vistra at 10.05%, Xcel Energy at 6.73%, and CenterPoint Energy at 6.46%.

overview.description: The Virtus Reaves Utilities ETF (UTES) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in utilities equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that holds US utility stocks. UTES' managers aim to outperform the sector by selecting and weighting stocks based on fundamental, growth and risk metrics. UTES was launched on Sep 23, 2015 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.

data.title: How Biden's infrastructure bill could impact the utilities trade
data.text: Jay Rhame, CEO of Reaves Asset Management, and Dave Nadig, chief investment officer and director of research at ETF Trends, discuss infrastructure and the utilities trade. With CNBC's Frank Holland.
